name: Avalo Therapeutics, Inc.
summary: PART I . Overview We are a clinical stage biotechnology company fully dedicated to developing IL-1-based treatments for immune-mediated inflammatory diseases. Our lead product candidate, abdakibart (AVTX-009), an anti-IL-1 monoclonal antibody (mAb) is in a Phase 2 clinical trial for hidradenitis suppurativa (HS). We are also exploring additional opportunities to make an impact in prevalent indications that have significant remaining unmet needs. Our current focus is on completing the Phase 2 (LO...
